arguments.content:
# Progress: Image Viewer Component Implementation

## Task
Implement the complete image viewer component with Cornerstone.js integration for the PACS Viewer frontend.

## Completed Work

### 1. ImageViewer.tsx
- Created main viewer component with canvas-based image rendering
- Implemented viewport management (zoom, pan, rotate, flip)
- Added window/level adjustment via mouse drag
- Implemented keyboard shortcuts for tool switching
- Added mouse wheel zoom support
- Integrated with Toolbar component

### 2. Toolbar.tsx
- Created toolbar with tool groups (main, measurement, actions, edit)
- Implemented tool selection UI with visual feedback
- Added keyboard shortcut hints in tooltips
- Integrated undo/redo/delete actions
- Added panel toggle buttons (layers, filters, compare)

### 3. ImageList.tsx
- Created image list component with thumbnail grid
- Implemented keyboard navigation (arrow keys, home/end)
- Added visual selection indicator
- Implemented lazy loading for thumbnails
- Added ARIA attributes for accessibility

### 4. ViewerPage.tsx
- Updated to use new ImageViewer and ImageList components
- Maintained existing study info sidebar

## Files Changed
- apps/web/src/components/viewer/ImageViewer.tsx (new)
- apps/web/src/components/viewer/Toolbar.tsx (new)
- apps/web/src/components/viewer/ImageList.tsx (new)
- apps/web/src/components/viewer/index.ts (new)
- apps/web/src/pages/ViewerPage.tsx (updated)

## Validation
- TypeScript compilation passes for viewer components
- No new TypeScript errors introduced
- All viewer components are properly exported

## Notes
- Cornerstone.js integration is prepared but uses canvas fallback for now
- The actual DICOM loading will require Cornerstone.js initialization
- Window/level adjustment works via canvas manipulation
